get.summary: Returns a list of uploaded files for an account

parameters.name: per_page

schema.description: Number of items per page, max 1000

parameters.description: Number of items per page, max 1000

post.summary: Creates a new uploaded file record
Returns a presigned URL for uploading a file to S3
Enqueues a file from S3 for processing

s3_url.description: The S3 URL of the file to process

get.summary: Returns the status of a file processing job

parameters.name: job_id

schema.description: The Sidekiq job ID returned from process_enqueue

parameters.description: The Sidekiq job ID returned from process_enqueue

TagList.description: Array of tags to help orgainse and search

TranslatedString.description: A locale map of translated strings keyed by language code (e.g. { "en": "Hello", "fr": "Bonjour" })

Error.description: A Single error object, Consists of a code and a message

CreateCodeInput.description: Request body for creating a code

UpdateCodeInput.description: Request body for updating a code

TranslatedUploadedFileId.description: An uploaded file ID, either a single integer or a locale map of IDs (e.g. { "en": 123, "fr": 456 })

AudioUrlFile.description: Audio file metadata for URL-sourced audio

oneOf.description: Locale map of URL audio file metadata, keyed by language code

ScreenDetail.description: A single screen with full details including story sections

CollectionItemInput.description: Request body for a collection item

UploadedFileInput.description: Request body for an uploaded file

StorySectionMediaItemPartial.description: Writable story section media item fields

StorySectionPriceItemPartial.description: Writable story section price item fields

StorySectionPriceItemInput.description: Request body for a story section price item

StorySectionOpeningTimeItemPartial.description: Writable story section opening time item fields

StorySectionOpeningTimeItemInput.description: Request body for a story section opening time item
